title: Hello World (Vanilla) v3
description: In this demo, we set up a listener for data in the Store object and then change the Cell to see the display update. We're making changes to the Hello World v2 demo.

    <title>Hello World (Vanilla) v3</title>
  </head>

    <script type="module" src="/src/main.js"></script>
  </body>
</html>
